description: Sequence input (DADA2/FASTA), BLAST search, match standardization

functions.name: read_sequence_table
functions.description: Ingest DADA2 seqtab matrix, FASTA file, or DNAStringSet; optional taxonomy join

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Sequence table, FASTA path, or DNAStringSet

output.description: Data frame with observation_id, sequence columns

functions.scaling_note: I/O bound; fast for typical eDNA datasets

functions.name: filter_sequences
functions.description: Filter ASVs by length range and minimum abundance

inputs.name: barcode_term
inputs.description: Barcode marker for auto length detection

functions.name: blast_sequences
functions.description: Remote NCBI BLAST or local rBLAST; score window filtering; taxonomy resolution

inputs.name: score_range
inputs.description: Keep hits within this % of top hit per query

output.description: Match data with score, accession, taxonomy

functions.scaling_note: Remote BLAST: ~2-5 min per batch of 50 sequences. Local: ~30 sec per 100 sequences

functions.name: standardize_match_data
functions.description: Standardize any match table to the canonical match_df format

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Raw match data with score and taxonomy columns

output.description: Standardized match object with observation_id, score, taxon_name, taxon_name_rank, taxonomy columns

functions.name: filter_redundant_hypotheses
functions.description: Drop higher-rank rows superseded by finer-rank rows within same lineage + observation_id

functions.name: read_birdnet_output
functions.description: Ingest BirdNET-Analyzer CSV results into match object format. observation_id = '{file_stem}_{start_s}-{end_s}'

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Path to BirdNET CSV file, directory of CSVs, or character vector of paths

inputs.name: top_n
inputs.description: Keep top N detections per observation_id by confidence

output.description: Match object with observation_id, score, species, genus, source_file columns

functions.name: read_animl_output
functions.description: Ingest Animl (MegaDetector + SpeciesNet) camera trap CSV into match object format. observation_id = image filename stem

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Path to Animl CSV file or data frame

inputs.name: top_n
inputs.description: Keep top N detections per image by confidence

output.description: Match object with observation_id (image stem), score, species, genus columns

functions.name: read_inaturalist_cv_output
functions.description: Read per-image JSON files from the iNaturalist CV API into match object format

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Path to JSON file or directory of JSON files

inputs.name: top_n
inputs.description: Keep top N predictions per image

output.description: Match object with observation_id, score, species, genus, common_name, taxon_rank columns

functions.name: read_wildlife_insights_output
functions.description: Read SpeciesNet / Wildlife Insights batch predictions JSON into match object format

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Path to Wildlife Insights batch predictions JSON file

inputs.name: top_n
inputs.description: Keep top N predictions per image

inputs.name: label_col
inputs.description: Key for species label in predictions

inputs.name: score_col
inputs.description: Key for confidence score in predictions

output.description: Match object with observation_id, score, species, genus, category columns
